title: Table Store Contract
description: Validates the _contract.json file for a Table store. A Table holds structured records (rows × columns) with optional state machine and references.

schema.description: JSON Schema for a single row. Each row's data file conforms to this.

states.description: If rows have a state machine, list the states.

guard.description: Prose; mirror in row-level invariants for machine enforcement.

invariants.description: JSON Schema if/then/else fragments for conditional row-level rules.

rule.description: JSON Schema fragment applied to each row on write.

title_field.description: Which field to use as the display title in widgets.

target_store.description: Path to the target store, e.g. 'stores/areas'.

document_columns.description: Columns whose value is a Document (sidecar markdown file).
